notes: Keeps both rollback tiers: the proven embedded 2026.07.14.2 release and a reversible previous-application backup; neither changes VPN configuration
Uses short-lived validated RAM caches, stale-while-revalidate overview data and one-time completion invalidation instead of clearing every cache on scan/select polling or update upload chunks
Aggregates expert status, profiles and manual profile details in one endpoint, caches the final aggregate and emits compact JSON to reduce KeenDNS round trips and payload size
Opens expert mode on the fast Servers tab and loads the VPN profile enhancer in parallel with the legacy Angular interface
Includes manual profiles in individual and mass availability scans without switching the active VPN profile
Adds parameter-free five-minute API performance telemetry and reproducible performance, cache-flow, safety, endpoint-scan and rollback checks
Does not change profile selection, XRay startup, Hysteria2, OAuth or routing logic
